summaryParagraphs: अब इस लाइव ब्लॉग को रोकने का वक़्त आ गया है. बीबीसी संवाददाता चंदन कुमार जजवाड़े को दीजिए इजाज़त. कल एक नए लाइव ब्लॉग के साथ फिर हाज़िर होंगे. बीबीसी हिन्दी पर मौजूद कुछ अहम ख़बरों को पढ़ने के लिए आप उनके साथ लगे लिंक पर क्लिक कर सकते हैं. - भारत ने इंग्लैंड को हराकर जीता अंडर-19 वर्ल्ड कप, वैभव सूर्यवंशी बने प्लेयर ऑफ़ द मैच और प्लेयर ऑफ़ द टूर्नामेंट - 'मैंने आज जो देखा उस पर यक़ीन करना मुश्किल था', वैभव सूर्यवंशी की तूफ़ानी पारी पर फ़िदा हुए क्रिकेट फ़ैंस और पूर्व क्रिकेटर - इस्लामाबाद में 'आत्मघाती धमाका', कम से कम 31 लोगों की मौत, 160 से ज़्यादा घायल - ट्रंप ने ईरान-अमेरिका की बातचीत में शामिल होने के लिए पाकिस्तान को क्यों भेजा न्योता For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. items.headline: NSE formally approves IPO in first step towards its long-delayed public markets debut
whyItMatters: National Stock Exchange of India Ltd (NSE) has formally approved its initial public offering (IPO), paving the way for the country’s largest stock exchange to list on the bourses after a prolonged del
summaryParagraphs: National Stock Exchange of India Ltd (NSE) has formally approved its initial public offering (IPO), paving the way for the country’s largest stock exchange to list on the bourses after a prolonged delay. The offer will see stake sale by existing shareholders, the company said in a regulatory filing on Friday. NSE's proposed IPO will see shares carry a face value of ₹ 1 each, the exchange notified. The company might see a 4-4.5% stake sale, which might take up to eight months, chief executive officer Ashishkumar Chauhan had told reporters earlier this month. The exchange also approved the formation of an IPO committee to oversee and execute the listing process. Such a panel is mandatory for companies without promoters looking to go public. The committee will be chaired by Life Insurance Corp’s former managing director Tablesh Pandey, who currently serves as a non-independent director on the exchange's board. Pandey, who retired as LIC’s managing director effective 31 May 2025, is also a For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Hero MotoCorp’s new CEO lays down priorities for the two-wheeler giant
whyItMatters: Harshavardhan Chitale, the new chief executive officer (CEO) of Hero MotoCorp Ltd, considers premium products, scooters, electric vehicles and exports are areas of strong growth potential for India’s
summaryParagraphs: Harshavardhan Chitale, the new chief executive officer (CEO) of Hero MotoCorp Ltd, considers premium products, scooters, electric vehicles and exports are areas of strong growth potential for India’s largest two-wheeler maker. “I have travelled extensively and now met with a broad spectrum of stakeholders, dealers, suppliers, partners, and of course, our team. These interactions have given me very good insight into what makes us the leader,” Chitale said in his first remarks since taking over as chief executive in an interaction with analysts. Chitale is the third new CEO in India’s automobile industry over the last six months as a new crop of leadership takes the helm at some of the largest companies in the space, including BMW and Hyundai Motor India, which saw Hardeep Singh Brar and Tarun Garg take over as chief executives, respectively. In a nearly hour-long chat with analysts on Friday after the company’s third-quarter earnings were announced Thursday, Chitale fielded questions on For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: India-Malaysia relations: How Modi's strategic visit signals regional recalibration
whyItMatters: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's forthcoming visit to Malaysia on 7th February 2026 represents far more than routine diplomatic engagement. This two-day official visit, his third to the Southeast Asian
summaryParagraphs: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's forthcoming visit to Malaysia on 7th February 2026 represents far more than routine diplomatic engagement. This two-day official visit, his third to the Southeast Asian nation, marks the first high-level interaction since India and Malaysia elevated their relationship to a Comprehensive Strategic Partnership in August 2024. The upgrade signifies a fundamental shift in bilateral relations, moving beyond previous tensions towards a more pragmatic and mutually beneficial framework. The visit, undertaken at the invitation of Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim, encompasses bilateral discussions, participation in the 10th India-Malaysia CEO Forum, and a significant community engagement with an anticipated gathering of 15,000 members of the Indian diaspora at the MINES International Exhibition and Convention Centre in Kuala Lumpur. The timing, coinciding with the Thaipusam festival and Chinese New Year celebrations, underscores the careful consideration give For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Trump shares video depicting Obamas as monkeys, gets social media heat
whyItMatters: New Delhi , UPDATED: Feb 6, 2026 21:39 IST Edited By: Sayan Ganguly US President Donald Trump has come under fire from the opposition Democratic Party after sharing a controversial one-minute video on
summaryParagraphs: New Delhi , UPDATED: Feb 6, 2026 21:39 IST Edited By: Sayan Ganguly US President Donald Trump has come under fire from the opposition Democratic Party after sharing a controversial one-minute video on his Truth Social platform portraying Barack Obama and Michelle Obama as apes. The video repeats unsubstantiated claims that Dominion Voting Systems was involved in the theft of the 2020 election. Posted on Thursday, the clip features brief images of the former US President and his wife superimposed on ape bodies, set to the song "The Lion Sleeps Tonight." A post by Trump sharing the video on Truth Social has gone viral. U.S. President Donald Trump posted this on Truth Social, which featured the Obamas as monkeys. pic.twitter.com/f0ovYjPnDy — Open Source Intel (@Osint613) February 6, 2026 The video drew condemnation from several public figures, with California Governor Gavin Newsom calling Trump’s behaviour "disgusting" and urging Republican leaders to speak out. items.headline: U19 WC Final: Sooryavanshi demolition job leads India to record sixth title
whyItMatters: India U19 clinched their sixth ICC Under-19 World Cup title with a dominant 100-run win over England U19 at Harare Sports Club. Fourteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi starred with 175 off 80 balls, th
summaryParagraphs: India U19 clinched their sixth ICC Under-19 World Cup title with a dominant 100-run win over England U19 at Harare Sports Club. Fourteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi starred with 175 off 80 balls, the fastest 150 in U19 history. India posted 411/9, and despite Caleb Falconer’s 115, England fell short at 311, as India’s bowlers maintained control. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

summaryParagraphs: India U19 claimed their sixth ICC Under-19 World Cup title in 2026, defeating England U19 by 100 runs at Harare Sports Club. summaryParagraphs: Google CEO Sundar Pichai and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang dismiss market panic over AI plugins, calling it overblown.
